entries.summary: Completed Comprehensive Codebase QA Review v5.1 — AI-Hardened Edition. 7 batches processed, 106 candidates generated, 79 unique validated findings after 3-layer validation (Explorer→Reviewer→Critic). Final report delivered with 6 CRITICAL, 32 HIGH, 33 MEDIUM, 8 LOW findings across 9 clusters.
top_rejection_reasons: Mocking in tests is standard practice - 4 CRITICAL downgraded to MEDIUM after critic challenge
Different security contexts justify different policies - duplicate validate_url() downgraded from HIGH
Test silently tolerates rejection - doesn't actively mask bugs - downgraded from HIGH to MEDIUM
lessons_learned: 3-layer validation (Explorer→Reviewer→Critic) with inline challenge gates is essential for HIGH/CRITICAL findings - 66% overturn rate on initial HIGH severity shows value
Serial batching (1-2 explorers at a time) prevents context overflow and maintains quality - 7 batches completed without degradation
Disprove_attempt field requirement for CRITICAL/HIGH candidates catches 15 false positives before they enter report
Documentation-code drift is the dominant issue pattern - 4 of 9 clusters involve configuration/API mismatches
Test false-confidence is critical - 19 findings (4 CRITICAL) show tests provide limited real assurance

entries.summary: Phase 2 completed: All 7 resilience and code quality tasks implemented. Hardened EmbeddingModel for offline-only (FR-301/302/303), implemented lazy BM25 and SentenceTransformer initialization (FR-501/502), added try/except error handling throughout (FR-601-607), extracted shared code patterns (FR-801-806), added offline URL validation (FR-901), and deferred app_gui initialization for faster startup (FR-503). Bug found and fixed: reranker null check in rag_engine.py.
top_rejection_reasons: test failure: reranker null check bug in rag_engine.py
lessons_learned: Tighter test engineer prompts with exact code context, mock targets, and assertions significantly improve first-pass success rate
Reality checks before implementation prevent ASSUMPTION INCORRECT issues — 3 found in this phase (8 print calls not 2, no logger in llm_interface.py, app_gui init follows _load_settings)
Security.py offline URL validation created an internally inconsistent comment — early rejection of non-file URLs doesn't actually enable file:// since allowed_schemes rejects it later
Reranker null check was a real bug caught by test_engineer — reranker.rerank() called without checking self.reranker is not None after failed init
Lazy initialization of SentenceTransformer requires FileNotFoundError to still be raised eagerly in __init__ for missing model paths, with actual loading deferred to _ensure_model_loaded()
